# Data Model Checklist: Fall Back to Straight-Line Distance When Routing Fails

**Purpose**: Ensure entities cover distance modes and fallback indicators.
**Created**: 2026-03-11
**Feature**: `specs/027-straight-line-fallback/spec.md`

**Note**: This checklist is generated by the `/prompts:speckit.checklist` workflow.

## Core Entities

- [x] CHK-DM-001 Distance result captures distance mode and fallback indicators.
- [x] CHK-DM-002 Fallback logs capture routing failure cause and correlation ID.
